3062570.name: Story of a Hunter
3062570.description:
Have you ever wondered how it feels to be an adventurer? Living in a world of magic and sword where you are free to live as you want? Don’t question more, welcome to “Stories of as Hunter”. This RPG looks to make every game feel completely unique and yours, so you can personalise your adventure at will.
"Story of a Hunter" is a turn-based RPG focuses on resource management and slice of life style. It is inspired in games such as "Stardew Valley" or "Etrian Odyssey" and presents a focus on mini-games and personalization.
3062570.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
